title: Right to Access Medical Records
summary: Patients have the right to obtain copies of their medical records.

plainExplanation.whatItMeans: Hospitals must provide medical reports when requested.
plainExplanation.whyItMatters: Ensures transparency and continuity of care.

exampleScenario.situation: Patient asks for test reports but hospital refuses.
exampleScenario.explanation: Patient has legal right to records.

stepByStepAction: Report to health authority if denied
